name: Skarner (League of Legends)
snippet: Skarner can move up to 550 units beyond the outer-edge of the battlefield with the charge . Once he has surpassed this boundary, Ixtal's Impact ends immediately ...

name: Skarner Abilities Rundown
snippet: Skarner's Attacks, Shattered Earth, Upheaval, and Impale , apply Quaking for a period of time. At max Quaking stacks, enemies take percent health magic damage ...
